html:
Exclusive to:

Disarming Tools are craftable Items exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. They are found in the Treasure Hunting Tab and can be crafted with 2 Iron Ores and 2 Cut Reeds. They do not require prototyping. It is also obtainable by trawling in the Lily Ponds with a small chance(1.96%).

Usage

Disarming Tools can be used to deactivate traps in the Ancient Pig Ruins:

  • They can be used to disarm Dart Traps, giving a Blow Dart for each trap disarmed.
  • They can also be used to disarm Pressure Plates, giving nothing.

Tips

  • The Blow Darts from Dart Traps can be used to fight Boss Monsters.
  • It is not recommended for the player to use this to disarm Pressure Plates, as Tools' durability will be wasted and Pressure Plates can be weighted by items.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

'''Disarming Tools''' are craftable [[Item]]s exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. They are found in the [[Treasure Hunting Tab]] and can be crafted with 2 [[Iron Ore]]s and 2 [[Cut Reeds]]. They do not require prototyping. It is also obtainable by trawling in the [[Lily Pond|Lily Ponds]] with a small chance(1.96%).

== {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
Disarming Tools can be used to deactivate traps in the [[Ancient Pig Ruins]]:
* They can be used to disarm '''[[Dart Trap]]s''', giving a [[Blow Dart]] for each trap disarmed.
* They can also be used to disarm '''[[Ancient Pig Ruins#Pressure Plates|Pressure Plates]]''', giving nothing.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == 
* The [[Blow Dart]]s from [[Dart Trap]]s can be used to fight [[Boss Monsters]].
* It is not recommended for the player to use this to disarm Pressure Plates, as Tools' durability will be wasted and Pressure Plates can be weighted by items.

{{Craftable Items}}
